hooks.command: sh -c '[ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] || { echo "agent-guard: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agent-guard" hook-pre-tool'
sh -c '[ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] || { echo "agent-guard: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agent-guard" hook-post-tool'
sh -c '[ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] || { echo "agent-guard: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT env not set" >&2; exit 2; }; "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agent-guard" hook-stop'
